title: FRESH TASTE PRODUCE USA AND ASSOCIATES INC. ransomware incident

victim.name: FRESH TASTE PRODUCE USA AND ASSOCIATES INC.

extortion.description: Fresh Taste Produce provides commercial and independent partners with the highest-quality fruits and vegetables from around the world. We are a multifaceted organization within the fresh fruit and vegetable industry, directly involved in farming, packing, importing, processing and distributing fresh produce from more than 35 countries https://freshtasteproduce.com
